reforms.description: The government plans to continue increasing the budget of the National Research Agency to enhance public research financing and competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for public research is expected to boost innovation and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government intends to continue increasing the budget of the National Research Agency.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing public research funding, which is crucial for fostering innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Continue to increase the budget of the National Research Agency.

reforms.description: The 2018 reform of continuous training aims to improve access to and the quality of training courses for low-skilled workers and jobseekers by monetising the personal training account and establishing a single financing body.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing access to training and improving its quality, the reform is expected to raise the skill levels of the workforce, thereby supporting productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform was launched in 2018 and is set to be fully operational by 2021.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the training system, aiming to simplify access and improve quality, which is crucial for enhancing the skills of the workforce and addressing inequality in training access.
reforms.source_quote: The training section of the Act for the freedom to choose one’s future career, which passed into law in September 2018, aims to simplify the training system, strengthen personal initiative and guidance, and to improve the quality and relevance of training.

reforms.description: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) was established in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations, supporting start-ups in high-tech capital-intensive sectors and funding disruptive innovation projects that address societal challenges.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance innovation capacity in high-tech sectors, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund was set up to provide funding for deep tech innovations.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the FII represents a significant structural change in funding innovation, targeting high-tech sectors and societal challenges, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: A new innovation fund (Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie, FII) has been set up in 2018 to provide funding for deep tech innovations.

reforms.description: Support for business innovation has increased significantly over the last decade, primarily through a generous R&D tax credit scheme and numerous direct policies aimed at promoting business innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The R&D tax credit scheme incentivizes private sector investment in research and development, fostering innovation and productivity growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Support for business innovation has increased considerably over the last ten years.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in the support for business innovation, enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem and addressing the complexities of the existing support system.
reforms.source_quote: Support for business innovation has increased substantially... through a R&D tax credit scheme, which is one of the most generous among OECD countries.

reforms.description: The Grand plan d’investissement and the Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie aim to enhance public investment in innovation and industry, supporting the development of new technologies and boosting economic growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment in innovation is expected to stimulate economic activity and enhance productivity through technological advancements.
reforms.status_evidence: The Grand plan d’investissement and the Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie were highlighted as key measures in the government's reform agenda.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing public investment in innovation, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement and the Fonds pour l’innovation et l’industrie aim to enhance public investment in innovation and industry.

reforms.description: The government plans to increase funding for public research while granting universities more autonomy over their human resource policies, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of research investments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for public research is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to increase funding for public research alongside reforms to grant universities more autonomy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in the governance of public research funding, aiming to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of research outputs.
reforms.source_quote: A selected increase in funding for public research should go along with reforms to raise universities’ autonomy over their human resource policies.

reforms.description: France plans to increase public spending for R&D by 0.1% of GDP, aiming to enhance innovation and productivity growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding is expected to stimulate innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced plans to increase public spending for R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public investment in R&D, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: The government plans to increase public spending for R&D by 0.1% of GDP.

reforms.description: France plans to increase public expenditures on R&D as part of broader fiscal reforms aimed at enhancing growth potential.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public R&D spending is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity, contributing positively to GDP growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to increase public spending for R&D as part of its fiscal reforms.
reforms.importance_rationale: The planned increase in R&D spending is significant but part of a broader set of fiscal reforms, indicating a commitment to enhancing innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The proposed tax and spending reforms give the government a choice of options to reduce public spending in the medium run... to increase spending on growth-enhancing investment, for example, public expenditures on R&D.

reforms.description: France created a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation, known as the Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture (FII), in 2018.
reforms.component_name: Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance R&D investment in radical innovations, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund was established to support radical technological innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated fund for radical innovation represents a significant shift in France's approach to fostering high-impact R&D, which is crucial for long-term economic competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Moreover, a specific investment fund for supporting radical technological innovation (Fonds pour l’innovation et la rupture, FII) was created in 2018.

reforms.description: The French government has launched the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), allocating EUR 15 billion to improve access to long courses and personal guidance for less qualified young people and jobseekers from 2018 to 2022.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of less qualified individuals, the plan aims to improve their employability and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan is actively being rolled out with regional commitments.
reforms.importance_rationale: This substantial investment in human capital is expected to have a long-term impact on the workforce's skills and employability, addressing critical gaps in the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: Under the skills investment plan (Plan d’investissement dans les compétences—PIC), EUR 15 billion will be spent on improving their access to long courses providing qualifications and providing personal guidance between 2018 and 2022.

reforms.description: The 2018 apprenticeship reform introduced a new operator, France Compétences, to manage apprenticeships, shifting responsibility from regional governments. This reform aims to enhance the attractiveness of apprenticeships through simplified procedures and increased financial support for apprentices.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving apprenticeship schemes, the reform is expected to enhance the skills of the workforce, thereby supporting innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The law was enacted in 2018, establishing the new framework for apprenticeships.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the management of apprenticeships, aiming to improve the quality and accessibility of vocational training, which is crucial for addressing skills shortages in the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: The 2018 law 'Loi pour la liberté de choisir son avenir professionnel' entrusted a new operator—France Compétences—and the professional branches with responsibility for apprenticeship.

reforms.description: The Grand plan d’investissement (GPI) is an interdepartmental investment plan aimed at improving the efficiency of public investment through evidence-based assessments and adjustments. It encompasses 26 measures focused on environmental sustainability, skills development, and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The GPI aims to enhance public investment efficiency, which can lead to increased productivity and innovation in various sectors, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The GPI has been operational since 2018 and includes mechanisms for annual appraisal and adjustment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The GPI represents a significant structural change in public investment strategy, integrating multiple priorities and substantial funding aimed at fostering innovation and sustainability.
reforms.source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement (GPI), which extends over 2018-22, is an interdepartmental investment plan under the authority of the Prime Minister that have mechanisms for adjusting investment decisions to increase its efficiency.

reforms.description: The French government has introduced measures to support major research universities as part of a broader investment plan aimed at compensating for the decline in government funding for research since 2008.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for research universities is expected to enhance research capacity and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The latest investment plan includes welcome measures for supporting major research universities.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to bolster research capacity in universities, which is crucial for innovation and economic competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The latest investment plan includes welcome measures for supporting major research universities.

reforms.description: The Grand plan d’investissement includes measures to increase spending on road and railway maintenance, renovate public buildings, and foster soft mobility.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased investment in infrastructure maintenance and renovation can enhance the efficiency and quality of public services, contributing to overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan includes specific measures aimed at improving infrastructure.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing public infrastructure, which is critical for long-term economic growth and sustainability.
reforms.source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement includes measures to increase spending on road and railway maintenance, renovate public buildings, and foster soft mobility.

reforms.description: The Grand plan d’investissement has earmarked EUR 9 billion to improve the energy efficiency of residential and public buildings over 2018-22, which includes existing measures to enhance energy performance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving energy efficiency reduces energy demand and costs, contributing to economic growth and environmental sustainability.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has allocated funding for energy efficiency improvements.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in infrastructure aimed at enhancing energy efficiency, which is crucial for meeting climate targets and improving public sector performance.
reforms.source_quote: The Grand plan d’investissement has earmarked EUR 9 bn to improve the energy efficiency of residential and public buildings over 2018-22.

reforms.description: The draft bill 'PACTE' aims to simplify the governance of top research units by establishing a single entity responsible for management, facilitating a more efficient allocation of resources and a streamlined process for firms to access innovative results.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying governance, the reform enhances collaboration between research units and firms, potentially leading to increased innovation and commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.status_evidence: The PACTE bill has been passed into law and is in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the governance of research units, which is expected to enhance the efficiency of resource allocation and improve collaboration with the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: The draft bill 'PACTE' widens the principle of a single entity in charge of the management mandate of the top research units (UMR).

reforms.description: The Grand plan d’investissement aims to boost e-government initiatives, including the modernization of public services through digital technologies, which is expected to improve efficiency and service delivery.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in digital technologies in public administration can lead to cost savings and improved service delivery, enhancing overall public sector efficiency.
reforms.status_evidence: Initiatives to develop the diffusion of digital technologies in public administration are moving ahead.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to modernize public services through digitalization, which is expected to yield positive outcomes in terms of efficiency and service quality.
reforms.source_quote: Boosting e-government as foreseen in the Grand plan d’investissement would also benefit from strengthening efforts to provide attractive career prospects for IT specialists.

reforms.description: The French authorities introduced an Innovation Council in the summer of 2018 to provide guidance on innovation policies, aiming to simplify existing measures and ensure stable support for innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Council is expected to enhance the coherence and effectiveness of innovation policies, thereby fostering a more conducive environment for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Innovation Council was established to guide innovation policies.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of the Innovation Council represents a significant step towards improving the governance of innovation policies, which is crucial for enhancing the overall innovation landscape in France.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities introduced an Innovation Council in the summer of 2018 to provide guidance on innovation policies, including a review of existing measures with an objective of simplification.

reforms.description: The budget of the National Research Agency (ANR) has been increased to improve the success rates of research project funding, alongside plans for a multi-annual financial framework to ensure predictable public research funding.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the ANR budget and ensuring predictable funding will enhance the quality and relevance of research projects, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The recent increases in the ANR budget with the aim to increase success rates over 20% is welcome.
reforms.importance_rationale: The increase in funding for the ANR is a significant reform aimed at improving the effectiveness of public research funding, which is essential for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The recent increases in the ANR budget with the aim to increase success rates over 20% together with the plan to set up a multi-annual financial framework for research is welcome.
